name: LendNation
description_short: LendNation at 2755 S 108th St, West Allis, WI 53227 is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 373 reviews. Call +1 414-328-5455.
description_long:
LendNation is an established short-term consumer lender operating more than 200 store locations across 11 states, with online lending also available in those markets. The San Antonio Bandera Road location has been in continuous operation since 2005, making it a long-standing fixture in the local community. The company positions itself around customer service, describing its approach as treating customers the way it would want to be treated itself.

The company offers a layered set of loan products designed for different borrowing needs and timelines. Payday loans range from approximately $100 to $1,000 and are designed to bridge a gap until the borrower's next paycheck. Multi-pay installment loans extend repayment over bi-weekly, semimonthly, or monthly schedules for terms up to 36 months. Title loans allow vehicle owners with a free-and-clear title to borrow against the vehicle's value while continuing to drive it. Beyond lending, LendNation also provides check cashing, Insight Mobile Banking cards, direct deposit, and instant debit card funding for cash received.

Several features distinguish this location from general payday lenders. The San Antonio branch holds a 4.8 out of 5 rating on Google from 161 reviews, indicating consistently positive customer experiences. The instant debit card funding option means approved borrowers can receive cash the same day without waiting for a bank transfer. The availability of installment loan products up to 36 months gives borrowers a longer-term alternative to single-payment payday loans. In-store and online application channels offer flexibility.

Honestly assessed, LendNation's core products — payday loans and title loans — carry the high APRs typical of the short-term lending industry, which are not disclosed on this location page. Payday loans are best treated as a last resort for genuine short-term cash emergencies, not a recurring credit solution. Title loans carry meaningful risk: failure to repay can result in vehicle repossession. Borrowers should compare costs against credit union payday alternatives or other lower-APR options before proceeding.
pros: San Antonio Bandera Road location has operated continuously since 2005
4.8 out of 5 Google rating from 161 customer reviews
Instant debit card funding enables same-day cash receipt
Installment loans available with repayment terms up to 36 months
Multiple loan types (payday, installment, title) under one roof
Apply online or in-store — dual-channel access
cons: APR rates for payday and title loans not disclosed on the location page
Title loans carry vehicle repossession risk if payments are missed
Closed Sundays — no weekend emergency access on the day most needed
Products and online access vary by state — not all services available everywhere
Payday loans due on next payday can create repeat borrowing cycles for cash-strapped borrowers
best_for: Borrowers needing $100–$1,000 cash before their next paycheck with no other credit access
Vehicle owners seeking a title-secured loan with scheduled payments and longer terms
Customers who prefer in-person service at an established local storefront
Borrowers who need funds the same day and can use instant debit card funding
diagnosis: LendNation is best for borrowers who need immediate short-term cash and have limited access to traditional credit, especially those who value an in-person experience at an established, highly-rated local branch. The main caveat is that payday and title loan APRs are typically very high — title loans additionally carry vehicle repossession risk — so these products are appropriate only for genuine short-term emergencies when lower-cost alternatives have been exhausted.
